title: After the Debut: Whoa, For Real?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer makes it through her debut, but
she wasn't able to run it the way she wanted—like
it was a party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To run freely, she must first free her mind. To that
end, we set her a goal of getting 9,000
like-minded fans who are down to party.
